title: Mexican Bean and Sprout Tacos
description: A flavorful and nutritious vegetarian taco dish loaded with sautéed mung bean sprouts, mexican seasonings, and a mix of juices.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the diced onion and sauté for 3-4 minutes.
Add the diced tomatoes, taco seasoning, and cumin. Sauté for another 4-5 minutes.
Stir in the mung bean sprouts and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Season with lime juice, salt, and pepper to taste.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by spooning the bean sprout mixture onto a tortilla and serving immediately.
